message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.matrix_transpose wrapper parity (franken_numpy-ozw7)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.linalg.matrix_transpose(x) so
batched last-two-axis transpose matches numpy. Test covers 2-D
matrix transpose, 3-D batched (preserving leading axis with shape
verification), 4-D batched, float dtype preservation, complex
matrix verifying transpose-without-conjugation (imag stays
positive), and 1-D input error parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
